claimText: SSI Mantra is India's indigenous surgical robotic system.
evidenceExcerpt: SSI Mantra is India's indigenous surgical robotic system.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying indigenous technological achievements in the healthcare sector.
distractorHooks: Claiming it is a foreign-imported robotic system like the Da Vinci surgical system
Claiming it is an industrial or space exploration robot

claimText: The SSI Mantra system performed the world's first cardiac telesurgery across a distance of 10,000 km.
evidenceExcerpt: It performed the world's first cardiac telesurgery across 10,000 km.
examUse: Fact-based statement in a question about global milestones achieved by Indian medical technology.
distractorHooks: Stating it performed the first neurosurgery instead of cardiac telesurgery
Stating the surgery was performed over a short local distance rather than an intercontinental distance of 10,000 km

claimText: The key features of the SSI Mantra surgical robotic system include 3D High-Definition Visualization and Predictive Analytics.
evidenceExcerpt: Features include 3D High-Definition Visualization and Predictive Analytics.
examUse: Feature-based question on the capabilities of modern indigenous surgical robots.
distractorHooks: Stating it lacks predictive analytics capabilities
Claiming it only supports standard 2D visualization
